mapper.select: SELECT application_group_id AS applicationGroupId, service_id AS serviceId, sel_gubun AS selGubun, del_yn AS delYn FROM EFBL.TB_SVC_INFO WHERE 1=1 AND application_group_id LIKE '%' || #{applicationGroupId} || '%' ORDER BY application_group_id

SELECT application_group_id AS applicationGroupId, service_id AS serviceId, sel_gubun AS selGubun, del_yn AS delYn FROM DFSL.TB_SVC_INFO WHERE 1=1 AND application_group_id LIKE '%' || #{applicationGroupId} || '%' ORDER BY application_group_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EFBL.TB_SVC_INFO (APPLICATION_GROUP_ID, SERVICE_ID, SEL_GUBUN, DEL_YN, UP_DTIME) VALUES (#{applicationGroupId}, #{serviceId}, #{selGubun}, #{delYn}, #{upDtime})
INSERT INTO DFSL.TB_SVC_INFO (APPLICATION_GROUP_ID, SERVICE_ID, SEL_GUBUN, DEL_YN, UP_DTIME) VALUES (#{applicationGroupId}, #{serviceId}, #{selGubun}, #{delYn}, #{upDtime})

INSERT INTO EFBL.TB_SVC_INFO (APPLICATION_GROUP_ID, SERVICE_ID, SEL_GUBUN, DEL_YN, UP_DTIME) VALUES
(#{r.applicationGroupId}, #{r.serviceId}, #{r.selGubun}, #{r.delYn}, #{upDtime})

INSERT INTO DFSL.TB_SVC_INFO (APPLICATION_GROUP_ID, SERVICE_ID, SEL_GUBUN, DEL_YN, UP_DTIME) VALUES
(#{r.applicationGroupId}, #{r.serviceId}, #{r.selGubun}, #{r.delYn}, #{upDtime})
